signals.signal_title: MPLX natural gas supply partnership with MARA Holdings for AI data center demand
signals.signal_description: MPLX entered a natural gas supply agreement with MARA Holdings to serve AI hyperscaler data center power demand. The deal underscores MPLX's positioning as a natural gas infrastructure provider for the AI buildout, potentially driving infrastructure expansion investments and associated IT modernization.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $11.82B — Midstream MLP, Marathon Petroleum subsidiary (general partner). Primarily fee-based natural gas gathering, processing, transportation. Denominator = EBITDA × 2.5 or Revenue × 0.12 (midstream sub-sector logic). ~6,000 employees (shared services with MPC). Findlay OH HQ — outside WWT STOLA territory, channel_mismatch=true. ms_standardized=true (inherits MPC M365/Azure stack). No CIO, CTO, or AI programs identified separately from MPC parent. MARA Holdings partnership signals AI data center natural gas demand. WWT opportunity: limited direct engagement due to Findlay HQ, but MPC parent relationship may create channel path.
